Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database - Classification Guide Edited by Jan Jansen 2023-02-07 Mobile species classification catalog This Classification Catalog shows example images for all labels used in the exhaustive search for mobile species in the Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database (AS-AID). It aims to give users an overview of the labels with reference to matching CATAMI labels. This catalog represents a snapshot of the database at the time of publication of the associated data-paper. Up to nine randomly selected images are presented for each classification, alongside a table with the following information: CATAMI: matching label in the CATAMI classification. For more information, the CATAMI paper can be found under this link CAAB codes: Codes for Australian Aquatic Biota Found_in_surveys: a list of all surveys in AS-AID in which this organism has been detected Total_annotations: the total number of annotations for this label VME-taxa: whether this label is identified as a CCAMLR Vulnerable Marine Ecosystem taxa Please direct any enquiries, questions or comments to Jan.Jansen@utas.edu.au 1 Mobile Fauna 1.1 Bony Fish, Rays & Skates Bony Fishes CATAMI CAAB Found_in_surveys Total_annotations VME_taxa Fishes Bony Fishes 37990083 PS96, PS81, TAN0802, TAN1802, TAN1901, NBP1402, PS18, CRS, PS14, PS06, AA2011, PS61, PS118, JR262, JR15005, JR17003, JR17001, NBP1502, LMG1311 449 No Rays & Skates CATAMI CAAB Found_in_surveys Total_annotations VME_taxa Fishes Rays & skates 37990030 PS81, TAN1802 3 No 1.2 Brachiopoda Brachiopoda CATAMI CAAB Found_in_surveys Total_annotations VME_taxa Brachiopods 19100000 PS96, PS81, TAN0802, TAN1802, TAN1901, NBP1402, PS18, CRS, AA2011, PS118, JR17003, JR17001, NBP1502 1982 Yes 1.3 Crustacea Crustacea CATAMI CAAB Found_in_surveys Total_annotations VME_taxa Crustacea 27000000 PS81, TAN0802, TAN1802, CRS 143 No Crustacea -
